docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GEARY, DAN AS TO DEFENDANT ARBONA, JAIME ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT RETURNED - UNABLE TO FORWARD
DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARBONA, JAIME

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-19-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT AGREE TO SETTLE THIS MATTER.
